text: Moving from an open, modern, and almost silent corridor into a vibrant, thought-provoking exhibition space, I feel a shift within myself—curiosity deepening, mind awakening. The stark minimalism of the hallway evoked introspective calm, while the creative wall of research and development fills me with excitement, urging me to ponder human intellect, technology, and our shared future. Here, I am inspired and alive, yet gently unsettled in the presence of innovation and ideas.
